title: Long Bed
body:
# Long beds... because why not?

## This resourcepack simply makes beds long. 4 blocks long to be exact.


<details>
<summary>Side View of the long bed</summary>

![Side view of the long bed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95a9e08df6e51d328552d91a5e234f9bf3000e02.png)

</details>


## V1 of the pack is compatible with any 1.12+ bed texture, just simply replace assets/minecraft/textures/blocks/bed.png with a bed of your choice! Or, just format a texture pack to add bed.png and overlay that pack over this one.


<details>
<summary>Long orange fox bed, texture from the Fancy Beds resource pack</summary>

![Long bed with the orange fox bed from the Fancy Beds resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43e8b24b5e463680247c8e40fd239dc48425cf23.png)

</details>

### Thanks to yeqevr's _Old Version 3d Beds_ pack on Planet Minecraft, used the bed model: [https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/old-version-3d-beds/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/old-version-3d-beds/)

## Alternatively, you can download the V2 pack to use the normal bed textures used for 1.8-1.11!

This pack does not support 1.12+, and I have no plans on making it.
